name: oi
description: Use your team's Contexts and Workflows through the Oi MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Contextify product execution across code, backlog, and design.
interface.longDescription: Connect Oi in Cursor so teams can load Contexts and Workflows into a thread, inspect setup readiness, and route one-shot work through product-aware MCP tools. Oi uses the hosted MCP endpoint with Cursor's OAuth flow, and supports oi and use Oi as invocation forms.
defaultPrompt: use Oi designer to review this flow.
use Oi to recommend the best setup for this feature plan.
